title: JSON Keys Are Strings — The Mitigation Is Validation
problem: Named constants (Category.DEMO, Feature.LANG) work in JavaScript but not in JSON. Slug keys in index.json are raw strings — they can drift from nodes.json without a type error.
decision: Accept that JSON is string-based. Mitigate drift with lib/check-key-alignment.js: a non-blocking CI check that compares slug and arc keys across nodes.json, arcs-v2.json, and index.json.
lesson: JSON is string-based. Keys are strings. This is unavoidable. The mitigation is validation, not elimination.
impact: Key drift caught on every PR via GitHub Actions comment. No false-blocking CI gate.
